meaning: adj.每年落叶的,非永久性的
examples: There are some areas, however, where broadleaf deciduous trees form the timberline.
Spartina alterniflora, known as cordgrass, is a deciduous, perennial flowering plant native to the Atlantic coast and the Gulf Coast of the United States.
Sporopollen implies warm-cool and moist climate of temperate zone, suggesting wide distribution of deciduous and latifoliate forests.
It is also known as tension wood in deciduous trees and compression wood in conifers.
Tree spotters may be pleased to spot the American larch, a deciduous conifer that isn't found much farther south.
